en.extract:
The northern puffback (Dryoscopus gambensis) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae.
It is found in northern sub-Saharan Africa. It forms a superspecies with the black-backed puffback, which replaces it in eastern equatorial and southern Africa.


Habitat
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical mangrove forests, and moist savanna.


Subspecies
There are five accepted subspecies:

D. g. gambensis (M. H. C. Lichtenstein, 1823) – Senegambia to coastal Gabon
D. g. congicus Sharpe, 1901 – lower catchment of Congo River
D. g. malzacii (Heuglin, 1870) – eastern Cameroon to northwestern Tanzania
D. g. erythreae Neumann, 1899 – Eritrea to South Sudan
D. g. erwini Sassi, 1923 – Itombwe in eastern DRC


Gallery


References

The '''northern puffback''' ('''''Dryoscopus gambensis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Malaconotidae]].
It is found in northern [[sub-Saharan Africa]]. It forms a [[species complex|superspecies]] with the [[black-backed puffback]], which replaces it in eastern equatorial and southern Africa.<ref name="sinc">{{cite book |last1=Sinclair |first1=Ian |last2=Ryan |first2=Peter |title=Birds of Africa south of the Sahara |date=2010 |publisher=Struik Nature |location=Cape Town |isbn=978-1-77007-623-5 |pages=580–581 |edition=2nd}}</ref>

==Habitat==
Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s, subtropical or tropical mangrove forests, and moist [[savanna]].

==Subspecies==
There are five accepted subspecies:<ref name=hbw>{{cite web |last1=Fry |first1=H. |date = 2017 |title=Northern Puffback (''Dryoscopus gambensis'') |website=Handbook of the Birds of the World Alive | publisher = Lynx Edicions, Barcelona | url = http://www.hbw.com/node/60514 |access-date=13 April 2017}}</ref>
* ''D. g. gambensis'' <small>(M. H. C. Lichtenstein, 1823)</small> – Senegambia to coastal Gabon
* ''D. g. congicus'' <small>Sharpe, 1901</small> – lower catchment of [[Congo River]]
* ''D. g. malzacii'' <small>(Heuglin, 1870)</small> – eastern Cameroon to northwestern Tanzania
* ''D. g. erythreae'' <small>Neumann, 1899</small> – Eritrea to South Sudan
* ''D. g. erwini'' <small>Sassi, 1923</small> – [[Itombwe Plateau|Itombwe]] in eastern [[Democratic Republic of the Congo|DRC]]
